text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ah, what a lovely event that was. And my sisters were as elegant as
ever. I wish to stand side by side with them on that stage as soon as
possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro meet and greet was a roaring success. On the way back,
Mejiro Bright and I find ourselves basking in the afterglow of the
event.

text_block_list.name: Event Attendee A
text_block_list.text:
Today's meet and greet was great and all, but to be honest, I'm not sure about
Bright and Dober. I haven't heard much about them.

text_block_list.name: Event Attendee B
text_block_list.text:
This is just what I've heard, but apparently their running could use some work.
The Mejiro family's hyping them up as future stars, but I dunno...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know Bright isn't usually the type to let a little criticism get to her.
Even so, today seems to be a little different.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...I have no choice but to achieve an exemplary result at the tryouts. I
must show everyone a run that will live up to their expectations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: This is my duty as an Umamusume of the Mejiro family...
choice_data_list: ...Hey, do you mind if we take a quick detour?
...Hey, do you mind if we take a quick detour?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh... This is where we first met. Hehe, that's right. We watched that
tree together, side by side.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? That leaf... I see it finally fell to the ground. What a shame. It
held on for so long, too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...My! I spot a bud... It's a little one, but it's definitely there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though the leaf we watched together has fallen, new life has already
begun to take its place. If it can fend off the remaining whispers of
winter, then it'll surely bud brilliantly in the coming spring.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: So that's how it is. Soon... spring will come.
choice_data_list: And it'll be your spring, Bright.
And it'll be your spring, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's always been moving forward by herself, at her own pace. My
advice helped her evolve—only because she had already laid down
the groundwork.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My spring... Is it truly... just around the corner?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Can I become just like my sisters? Can I finally join their ranks as a
proud Mejiro?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Relative A
text_block_list.text:
Bright? Unfortunately, she has a rather delicate build... It's a shame,
but racing will likely prove difficult for her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Ryan has a gift for running! She'll make waves in the scene for sure.
Hm? As for Bright... you watch from the sides for now.

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Bright, what were you—oh, were you watching us run again? You
should just run with us next time!

text_block_list.name: Young Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Ryan. Can I... Can I become like you and the others someday?

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! I dunno what you mean by "like us," but you can be
whatever you wanna be!

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: So come on—let's run together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...I finally understand. Back then, when I was staring at that leaf... I
must've been waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I shall present you with a victory at tomorrow's tryouts. And then, I'll
make my debut!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Huh... It looks like today's race is full of slow starters. I'm guessing
they'll save their gas for the final stretch, which means we're in for a
long one.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text: The Mejiro Bright is here, too. And she's acting as carefree as ever... I wonder how she'll do. It'll all come down to the timing of her final approach.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Provisional Trainer, I've finished my warm-up. Do you have any words
for me today?
choice_data_list:
Remember to focus on both your own running
and your position in the pack.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This race will likely come down to a battle of patience over when to
accelerate in the final stretch. Worrying too much about your time
and losing your pace means putting yourself at a disadvantage.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
All I need to do is wait for my opportunity and seize it. Just like we
practiced.
...Still, can I really win this race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her acceleration might be a tad slow, but her running itself is a cut
above the rest. As long as she times her final spurt correctly, she
won't lose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee, thank you. I promise to live up to your expectations of me...
and achieve victory!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And our racers are out of the gates! 1,800 meters of turf, six
racers—all proceeding along at a slow and steady pace!

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text: ...H-hey, this is more than just slow and steady... Someone, anyone... hurry up and take the lead!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Haha... this is kinda funny. Aren't they going way too slow?

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I can't take this! I'm a little early, but here I go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(...There's nothing to fear. I only need to keep my pace and wait for
an opportunity. And once it's my turn to blossom...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(...I can hear your voice, just like when we practiced. My time to
blossom... has come!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Our racers have reached the final stretch! They're all speeding
up—What's this?! From the very back of the pack, Mejiro Bright flies
forward!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, bear witness! I shall show you the might of the Mejiro
family—of its newest light!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright has convincingly won the tryouts race! But before I have
time to bask in her victory...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I-it took her two minutes?! To run 1,800 meters?! That's way too slow,
at least ten seconds behind the average!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Well, this is worse than I expected. Who's going to want to
train someone who took two whole minutes to run 1,800 meters?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Don't worry, I saw it. I saw your strength... and your determination. I
need to make sure I don't fall behind!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I've returned, Provisional Trainer... Look, I won the race as I promised!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure, her time was slow. But her ability to surge forward in the final
stretch is a talent that'll surely be applicable even in the highest
echelon of races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she can perfect that skill, then her future looks bright. As I think
that, I find myself curious about her future racing career, and the road
that she'll walk.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well then, Trainer. I look forward to working with you from today
onwards.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm aiming for faraway heights—the summit of the racing world.
However, those peaks are too bright for me to face alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That is why... I would like you to guide me there. Please, will you join
me in welcoming the spring?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Gasp! I'm so happy. Yaaay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I've teamed up with Mejiro Bright to compete in the Twinkle
Series, where she can reach new and greater heights!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hooray. Woo... I've finally... debuted. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...How long are you planning to stand there? If you're going to be
Bright's trainer, then you have to learn when to cut her off, or you
won't make any progress.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, sorry to interrupt, but if you're going to be Bright's trainer,
then you should learn when to cut her off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Okaaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Okaaay! ♪
